executives.name: Patrick Jany
executives.background: Patrick Jany joined Maersk in 2020 from Clariant AG, where he was the CFO. He has extensive experience in finance and executive management from various roles at Sandoz and Clariant.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors
